caption: AC-1 — lists map to a phase, no per-list config
assert: Board renders phase-mapped columns: Plan/Implement show a "phase: …" subheader; manual lists show kind·trigger (no per-list skill/taskType/tier/mode)

caption: AC-1 — the Plan list carries only a phase (no skill/taskType/tier/mode)
assert: GET /lists Plan object carries "phase": "plan" and no skill/taskType/tier/mode fields (D15)

caption: AC-2 — a work kind gives the card its rail (phase plan)
assert: New-card sheet with the full-feature work kind renders its rail as phase chips PLAN…REPORT (phases from the work kind’s phase plan)

caption: AC-2 — the card lands in the entry list carrying its work kind
assert: The created card lands in the Backlog (entry) list carrying its full-feature work-kind chip

caption: AC-3 — with the plan gate evidence, the card advanced Plan → Implement
assert: With the plan-phase gate present, the card advanced Plan → Implement (activity line “Plan → Implement (in-session)”, engine-owned)

caption: AC-3 — the durable plan-phase gate the engine required before advancing
assert: The runDir gate-status.json carries the gates.plan entry — the durable evidence that permitted the advance (D9)

caption: AC-4 — advancing WITHOUT gate evidence parks the card needs-attention
assert: Advancing WITHOUT gate evidence parked the card in Needs attention with reason “no durable gate evidence for the plan phase” (D9)

caption: AC-5 — a manual move into a locked autonomous list is rejected (HTTP 403)
assert: Manual PATCH /cards/{id} move of a card on an autonomous list is rejected: HTTP 403 engine-owned (D16)
